running: Goals are meant to be crushed.
You're capable of more than you think.
The finish line is just the beginning.
walking: A walk a day keeps the doctor away.
Explore the world one step at a time.
Health and happiness start with a walk.
cycling: You never regret a bike ride :)
Wind in your hair, freedom in your soul.
Every pedal stroke gets you closer to your goal.
A day without cycling is a day lost.
workout: Never give up on a dream just because it takes time.
Training is the best investment you can make in yourself.

milestone.title: New milestone
milestone.body: Great work! You reached {{count}} days in a row.

notifications.physicalDevice: A physical device is required for push notifications.
notifications.dailyBody: Don't forget to log your streak.
notifications.streakBody: You hit your daily goal — {{streak}} days of {{type}}!
notifications.testBody: This is a test notification to verify scheduling.
notifications.scheduledBody: A test notification will appear in about 5 seconds.
notifications.errorBody: Could not schedule the test notification. Check the logs.

alerts.clearBody: All data in local storage has been cleared.
alerts.resetStreakBody: Are you sure you want to reset your current streak?
alerts.resetBestBody: Are you sure you want to reset your longest streak?
alerts.bestNotResetBody: You can't reset longest streak while history exists.
alerts.bestUpdatedBody: Your longest streak now matches your active streak: {{count}} days.
alerts.bestClearedBody: No active streak, so longest streak is set to 0.
alerts.maxDaysBody: You can't log more than 9999 days.
alerts.goalNotMetBody: Remember to meet your daily goal (e.g. at least 1.61 km or 20 minutes).
alerts.alreadyLoggedBody: You've already logged your activity for today.
alerts.updateBody:
Here's what's new:

• Streak history
• Improved design
• Better log button
• And more!

retro.run: What was the first day you ran?
retro.walk: What was the first day you walked?
retro.cycling: What was the first day you cycled?
retro.workout: What was the first day you worked out?

logModal.workout: Have you worked out for {{duration}} today?

encouragement.title: Your streak was reset
encouragement.body: Everyone has off days. Shake it off and start fresh — you've got this!

history.title: Streak history
history.empty: No history yet. Log a streak to get started!
